Bash(node -e "const { createClient } = require\(''@supabase/supabase-js''\); const supabase = createClient\(''https://apesvvqntqldihnzmitn.supabase.co'', ''sb_publishable_mRVhQVRmCmX7mYUpy6WDxw_Nu6iaN7_''\); const tables = [''users'',''reports'',''requests'',''announcements'',''rewards'',''notifications'',''transactions'',''settings'',''barangay'',''categories'',''comments'',''feedback'',''history'',''logs'']; Promise.all\(tables.map\(t => supabase.from\(t\).select\(''*''\).limit\(2\).then\(\({data,error}\) => error ? null : \(''TABLE: '' + t + '' | cols: '' + \(data && data[0] ?
